title: pleurogramme intermedia
intro: Pleurogramme intermedia, also known as the Intermediate Rock Cap, is a species of liverwort, a type of non-vascular plant that belongs to the phylum Marchantiophyta. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pleurogramme intermedia include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions or decoctions, and it can also be found in the form of dried leaves or extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal agent.
